articles.title: Multibaggers, mirages and market math
articles.description: An experiment demonstrates how survivorship bias can create the illusion of market genius. By selectively sharing successful predictions and discarding failures, a perfect track record can be manufactured. This bias also influences equity investing, leading investors to chase multi-baggers without considering the underlying conditions that enable such gains.

articles.title: Cancer risk awareness and concrete plans boosted gastric screening during COVID-19
articles.description: A study conducted by researchers at University of Tsukuba revealed that individuals with higher cancer-related health literacy, perceived susceptibility to gastric cancer, and encouragement from family members or health care providers demonstrated stronger intentions to undergo gastric cancer screening, even during the COVID-19 pandemic. These intentions were significantly associated with subsequent screening participation. In contrast, while fear of COVID-19 increased screening intention in the short term, over time it could suppress screening behavior.

US president calls Abu-Bilal al-Minuki ‘most active terrorist in the world’ and says he was eliminated in ‘very complex mission’

“Tonight, at my direction, brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world from the battlefield,” the US president said on his Truth Social platform Friday.

articles.title: Analysis shows how using obesity drugs for weight loss is associated with a clinically relevant drop in blood pressure
articles.description: A meta-analysis of 32 studies and 43,618 adults presented at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey (May 12–15) shows that use of new classes of obesity drugs for weight loss is associated with a clinically relevant drop in blood pressure (BP): a 0.34 mmHg reduction in systolic BP per 1% weight loss.

articles.title: Trial shows rapid weight loss is much more effective than gradual weight loss, challenging prevailing beliefs
articles.description: New research presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026) in Istanbul, Turkey, shows that rapid weight loss (RWL) is much more effective than gradual weight loss (GWL) in both achieving higher weight loss and also sustained weight loss at one year.

articles.title: Scientists discover vitamin B2 may help cancer cells survive
articles.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising dark side to vitamin B2: it may help cancer cells stay alive. The vitamin supports a cellular shield that protects tumors from ferroptosis, a form of programmed cell death linked to cancer suppression. In lab tests, researchers used a vitamin B2-like compound called roseoflavin to break down that protection and trigger cancer cell death.

articles.title: The brain’s “feel good” chemical may be secretly fueling tinnitus
articles.description: Scientists have uncovered evidence that serotonin — the same brain chemical boosted by many antidepressants — may actually worsen tinnitus. Using advanced light-based brain stimulation in mice, researchers identified a serotonin-driven circuit linked directly to tinnitus-like behavior. The findings may explain why some people experience louder ringing in their ears while taking SSRIs.

articles.title: Where do you think your ‘self’ is? Your answer is revealing

articles.title: License to deliver: Some midwives break the law to assist with home births
articles.description: In a midwife's suburban Atlanta home with a playground and chicken coop outside, Madie Collins lay on an examination table while the midwife measured her pregnant belly.  Unlike at many a doctor's office, no crinkly paper sheet covered the table and no antiseptic chill lingered in the air. The room next door, where Collins' appointment began, was filled with children's toys and scented candles and warmed by a wood-burning stove.

articles.title: IDFC First Bank case: Haryana govt. gives go-ahead to CBI to probe five IAS officers' role
articles.description: Sixteen accused have so far been arrested in the case

articles.title: Governor’s secretariat writes to Karnataka government on timely conduct of Bengaluru civic elections
articles.description: The Governor’s secretariat requested the Chief Secretary to take necessary steps to ensure that the SEC receives adequate financial and logistical support for holding the elections without delay

articles.title: Trump says Islamic State group leader was killed in a joint U.S.-Nigerian mission
articles.description: Trump announced the joint operation in Africa's most populous country in a late-night social media post. He said Abu Bakr al-Mainuki was second in command of the Islamic State group globally.

articles.title: Trump says Islamic State ‘second in command’ killed by US and Nigerian forces
articles.description:
US president calls Abu-Bilal al-Minuki ‘most active terrorist in the world’ and says he was eliminated in ‘very complex mission’
Donald Trump has said US and Nigerian forces killed the “second in command” global leader of the Islamic State.
“Tonight, at my direction, brave American forces and the Armed Forces of Nigeria flawlessly executed a meticulously planned and very complex mission to eliminate the most active terrorist in the world from the battlefield,” the US president said on his Truth Social platform Friday.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Trump says U.S. kills Islamic State leader in Nigeria
articles.description: President Trump announced Friday evening that U.S. and Nigerian military forces had killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a leader in the Islamic State group.

articles.title: 'Exceptional' Kartik Sharma is beginning to live up to his big billing
articles.description: "Since he has come at No. 4 or No. 5, he has been batting exceptionally well," Ambati Rayudu says about CSK's 20-year-old batter Kartik Sharma

articles.title: Suvendu Adhikari-led BJP govt orders re-verification of 1.69 crore caste certificates issued in Bengal since 2011
articles.description: Issuing authorities have been asked to carry out the re-verification exercise in line with prevailing norms, given the “importance and sensitivity” of the matter.

articles.title: 'People are forced to travel in bullock carts': Congress stages protest over fuel, milk price hike
articles.description: Congress workers protested rising fuel and milk prices, with leaders arriving by bullock cart to highlight inflation's impact. Delhi Congress president Devendra Yadav criticized the government's handling of essential commodity costs, stating inflation has doubled since 2014. This demonstration follows a recent Rs 3 per litre hike in petrol and diesel prices across major cities.

articles.title: UN event highlights India-Oman maritime ties through maiden voyage of stitched sail vessel
articles.description: The Indian Ambassador to the UN Parvathaneni Harish underlined that India and Oman share a maritime relationship of peaceful trade and commerce that goes back centuries

topStories.title: Trump says Islamic State group leader was killed in a joint U.S.-Nigerian mission
topStories.description: Trump announced the joint operation in Africa's most populous country in a late-night social media post. He said Abu Bakr al-Mainuki was second in command of the Islamic State group globally.

topStories.title: NEET-UG paper leak row: Doctors' body calls for dissolution of NTA, files plea in Supreme Court
topStories.description: Doctors' body UDF has petitioned the Supreme Court to dissolve the National Testing Agency, citing a "catastrophic failure" in the NEET-UG 2026 exam's conduct due to alleged paper leaks. The plea also demands significant reforms for transparency and fairness in national entrance tests, aiming to prevent future irregularities.

topStories.title: Bitcoin slips towards $79K as higher Treasury yields and oil prices pressure trigger risk-off sentiment
topStories.description: Bitcoin dipped towards $79,000, influenced by rising US Treasury yields, inflation concerns, and high oil prices, impacting global risk assets. Major altcoins also saw declines, with the global crypto market capitalization falling. Analysts suggest Bitcoin's pullback is macro-driven, with key resistance at $82,000-$82,500.

topStories.title: Iran war day 78: Trump, Tehran signal talks as Lebanon truce extended
topStories.description: Iran says Trump signalled openness to talks as deadlock remains over Tehran’s nuclear programme.

topStories.title: ‘Will erode goodwill’: Congress warns Vijay against inducting rebel AIADMK MLAs into Tamil Nadu govt
topStories.description: Congress has cautioned Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay against incorporating rebel AIADMK members into his government.  Karti Chidambaram stressed that the public mandate was for a government independent of both AIADMK and DMK.  Inducting the splinter group, he warned, would significantly damage Vijay's goodwill and credibility, urging him to remain true to the electoral mandate.

topStories.title: Trump says Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, second in command of ISIS globally, killed in US-Nigerian operation
topStories.description: President Trump announced U.S. and Nigerian forces eliminated Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, whom he identified as the second in command of ISIS globally.

topStories.title: Long Island Rail Road workers go on strike after failing to reach new contract
topStories.description: The strike stemmed from a four-year contract​. The MTA and unions agreed to the terms of the first three years, but disputes arose about the final year.

topStories.title: Trump Says US Forces, Nigeria Armed Forces Killed ISIS Leader
topStories.description: US and Nigerian forces killed an ISIS leader who was hiding in Africa, President Donald Trump said, adding that his death has “greatly diminished” the group’s global operations.

topStories.title: Trump says U.S. kills Islamic State leader in Nigeria
topStories.description: President Trump announced Friday evening that U.S. and Nigerian military forces had killed Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a leader in the Islamic State group.

topStories.title: New York doctor who survived Ebola says he fears for healthcare workers
topStories.description: A New York doctor who contracted and survived Ebola more than a decade ago says he is worried for healthcare workers who are at the center of treating the latest outbreak.

topStories.title: Route 66 centennial spurs tourism in historic small towns
topStories.description: A few small towns along U.S. Route 66 crumbled when it was decommissioned in the 1980s, but the road's 100th anniversary this year has rebirthed tourism along the historic route.

dailyNews.title: Prominent N.Y. synagogue targeted in alleged terror plot, prosecutors say
dailyNews.description: An Iraqi national allegedly plotted to carry out terror attacks in the U.S., including at a prominent synagogue in New York, prosecutors said Friday.

dailyNews.title: Caitlin Clark honored for massive career milestone before Fever fall in overtime thriller
dailyNews.description: Caitlin Clark scored 32 points and hit a clutch three-pointer to force overtime, but the Indiana Fever fell to the Washington Mystics 104-102 on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Iran says it "cannot trust" U.S. in negotiations
dailyNews.description: Two days of talks in Washington between Lebanon and Israel produced an extension of the current ceasefire by 45 days.

dailyNews.title: Colorado governor commutes Trump ally Tina Peters' prison sentence
dailyNews.description: Colorado's governor on Friday announced he is commuting the sentence of former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters.

dailyNews.title: Analysis shows how using obesity drugs for weight loss is associated with a clinically relevant drop in blood pressure
dailyNews.description: A meta-analysis of 32 studies and 43,618 adults presented at the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey (May 12–15) shows that use of new classes of obesity drugs for weight loss is associated with a clinically relevant drop in blood pressure (BP): a 0.34 mmHg reduction in systolic BP per 1% weight loss.

dailyNews.title: Trial shows rapid weight loss is much more effective than gradual weight loss, challenging prevailing beliefs
dailyNews.description: New research presented at the European Congress on Obesity (ECO 2026) in Istanbul, Turkey, shows that rapid weight loss (RWL) is much more effective than gradual weight loss (GWL) in both achieving higher weight loss and also sustained weight loss at one year.

dailyNews.title: STAT+: A political contest in the U.K. could shake up drug pricing
dailyNews.description: Makary and Cassidy's fates, U.S. pressures Germany to pay more for drugs, and other health news

dailyNews.title: Senator John Kennedy introduces America to ‘Margaret,’ his elliptical trainer named after Thatcher
dailyNews.description: Sen. John Kennedy posts a tongue-in-cheek video introducing his elliptical trainer named Margaret after Margaret Thatcher, going viral on social media.

dailyNews.title: Washington Nationals unveil the latest stadium snack that will excite some, horrify others
dailyNews.description: The Washington Nationals' Hot Dog Day featured hot dog fries, shoestring-style fried wieners with chipotle ranch, sparking debate among baseball fans.

dailyNews.title: Waymo driverless cars overrun Atlanta neighborhood, circling cul-de-sacs and alarming families with kids
dailyNews.description: Atlanta's Buckhead neighborhood was overrun by empty Waymo driverless cars circling through cul-de-sacs due to a routing behavior issue.

dailyNews.title: FDA shuffles top drug, biologics leaders in latest shakeup
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration is shuffling its top drug and biologics regulators, days after the departure of former commissioner Marty Makary.

dailyNews.title: ‘Perfect statement’: Trump defends his dismissal of Americans’ finances amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: The president also said he’s not considering the political implications of the Iran war on the midterms, when Republicans will be defending slim majorities in each chamber.

topStories.description: President Trump's trip to China could bolster economic relations, but failed to deliver a breakthrough deal, some trade and energy experts said.

topStories.description: Amid stepped-up surveillance flights, a visit of the C.I.A. director and an energy embargo, the White House is trying to increase pressure on Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Trump talks up trade deals with China, but experts see no big wins for U.S.
dailyNews.description: President Trump's trip to China could bolster economic relations, but failed to deliver a breakthrough deal, some trade and energy experts said.

dailyNews.title: With Possible Raúl Castro Indictment, U.S. Eyes Venezuela Playbook
dailyNews.description: Amid stepped-up surveillance flights, a visit of the C.I.A. director and an energy embargo, the White House is trying to increase pressure on Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s ‘Learning Curve’ on China Ends With Conciliation at Summit
dailyNews.description: The president has shifted the foundations of American policy toward China, throwing aside the adversarial approach of recent years.

dailyNews.title: Why Were These C.E.O.s in Beijing With Trump?
dailyNews.description: Some of America’s most powerful C.E.O.s accompanied President Trump to Beijing during his summit with President Xi Jinping of China. Our reporter Ana Swanson explains what they were hoping to gain from the trip.

dailyNews.title: Trump Turns Taiwan Arms Sales Into Bargaining Chip With China
dailyNews.description: The president said a potential arms deal for Taiwan was a “very good negotiating chip” in talks with Beijing. His words raise questions about the steadfastness of U.S. support.

dailyNews.title: For Xi’s Critics, Trump’s China Visit Is Fuel for Jokes They Can’t Tell
dailyNews.description: On Threads and other sites, liberal-minded Chinese accounts were mocking the proceedings and offering a rare window into opinions on Xi Jinping and his leadership style.

dailyNews.title: Back From China, Trump Faces Decision on Whether to Resume Strikes on Iran
dailyNews.description: Top aides have drafted battle plans as peace negotiations have stalled.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Weighs $1.7 Billion Fund for Allies Investigated Under Biden
dailyNews.description: Critics denounced the highly unusual plan, which has yet to be finalized or approved, as a vast political slush fund financed by taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: Trump leaves China with no agreement on thorny issues, but cites ‘very good’ talks with Xi
dailyNews.description: Though U.S. President Donald Trump said he and Chinese President Xi Jinping “discussed almost everything,” their Beijing summit produced no sweeping agreements.

dailyNews.title: Few deals from Trump’s trip and no progress on Iran send global markets into a sell-off
dailyNews.description: Government bonds around the world sold off sharply Friday as the price of oil jumped, both driven by developments in the Iran war, politics and trade.

dailyNews.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
dailyNews.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ISIS second-in-command killed in Africa
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump late Friday said that a top Islamic State group commander has been killed in Africa in a joint operation with Nigeria’s armed forces

dailyNews.title: Trump says China and Taiwan should 'both cool it'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump spoke about Taiwan after a two-day visit to China, where he said he discussed Iran, and trade deals with Chinese President Xi Jingping.

dailyNews.title: Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show
dailyNews.description: Trump bought shares of Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola and Dell worth millions, new ethics disclosure filings show.
